caption: A digital screen displays a financial candlestick chart tracking the stock performance of "Exxon Mobil-Multinational Oil". The chart features a white background with a price scale on the right ranging from 0.00 to 110.00. A complex set of green and red candlesticks is overlaid with several curved trend lines and alphabetical labels such as "a", "b", "c", "d", and "e". At the top, a data bar includes text such as "L=102.98, V=9,545,808". Below the main chart, secondary indicators for "MACD" and "Stochastic Slow" are visible, alongside a "On Balance Volume" line. The text "CW projections (0.8,BLACK,INI)" appears in a bottom panel. Across the sequence of frames, the image remains largely static, with only minimal shifts in the data values and the position of the cursor, reflecting a steady view of a technical market analysis tool.
